title: BrsAPI Gold/Currency/Cryptocurrency Latest Snapshot
time_coverage: 2026-07-14 (1405/04/23) single latest snapshot -- 9 gold/coin items, 28 currency items, 19 cryptocurrency items
frequency: point-in-time (free-tier Gold_Currency.php has no history; the Pro/history-capable endpoint Gold_Currency_Pro.php returned HTTP 402 payment_required when tested with history=2 -- confirmed free tier is latest-only)
units: Toman, explicitly labeled per-item via the 'unit' field (تومان = toman for IRR-denominated items, دلار = dollar for USD-denominated items like XAUUSD gold ounce). Multiply toman-denominated values by 10 for rial. No hidden thousand-multiplier here (unlike navasan's /latest/ bahar/sekkeh fields) -- IR_COIN_BAHAR price=175,020,000 is already plain toman.
license_terms: Free tier, up to 1,500 requests/day, no explicit redistribution terms found; used here for corroboration/citation only.
notes: Key read from secrets/iran_api_keys.env (BRSAPI_KEY), never written to any repo file. IR_COIN_BAHAR=175,020,000 toman (=1,750,200,000 rial) and IR_COIN_EMAMI=179,505,000 toman (=1,795,050,000 rial), both from 2026-07-14 14:39 Tehran time, corroborate this project's TGJU-sourced gold-coin charts (2026-07-11 closes: Bahar 1,721,800,000 rial, Emami 1,760,100,000 rial) and independently agree with navasan's same-day x10,000-scaled snapshot values within a few hundred toman. USD=183,990 toman (1,839,900 rial) and USDT_IRT=184,174 toman corroborate the parallel-market FX chart. Also includes 18K/24K/melted gold gram prices and XAUUSD (global gold ounce, USD) not currently charted anywhere in this project -- see the companion commodity-latest dataset for the fuller global-commodity breakdown proposed as new charts.
